name: ScadaTag
description: Structure of a SCADA tag data point including real-time value, quality, alarm limits, and device source information

fields.name: tagId
fields.description: Unique identifier / address for the tag in the SCADA namespace (e.g., PLANT1.AREA2.PV_101)

fields.name: tagPath
fields.description: Hierarchical path in the SCADA tag browser (folder/subfolder/tag)

fields.name: value
fields.description: Current real-time value - type depends on dataType field (Float, Integer, Boolean, String)

fields.name: dataType
fields.description: OPC-UA data type: Float, Double, Integer, Boolean, String, DateTime

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the most recent reading

fields.name: quality
fields.description: OPC-UA quality status: Good, Uncertain, Bad, Stale

values.description: Data may be stale or from a backup source
Data is unreliable - device communication issue
Data has not been updated within the configured scan rate

fields.name: engineeringUnits
fields.description: Physical units for the tag value (e.g., PSI, °C, RPM, m3/hr)

fields.name: description
fields.description: Extended description of what the tag measures

fields.name: deviceSource
fields.description: Information about the field device providing this tag

nestedFields.name: deviceType
nestedFields.description: PLC, RTU, DCS, IED, Sensor, Controller

nestedFields.name: protocol
nestedFields.description: Modbus-TCP, OPC-UA, DNP3, EtherNet/IP, PROFINET, BACnet, MQTT

fields.name: processArea
fields.description: Logical plant area or unit (e.g., Reactor Section, Cooling Tower, Compressor Station)
